name: tripwire
description: Tripwire monorepo root. server/ is the Node TypeScript MCP server (built with tsc). plugin/ is the roblox-ts Studio plugin (built with rbxtsc). Each package builds with its own toolchain, so do not run rbxtsc at the root. This is intentionally not an npm-workspaces repo, which keeps the plugin's @rbxts deps local for the node_modules/@rbxts path that Rojo references.

scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix plugin run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix plugin install
